query: Review this PR. It adds a new admin endpoint that deletes user accounts.
expected_behavior: Checks the Blocking Registry first (any, console.log, secrets) before anything else
Performs a 6-Layer Authorization audit on the new endpoint: Menu, Page, Route, Policy, Resource, Action
Flags if the authorization is only checked at one layer (e.g. only a route guard) without policy and resource-level enforcement
Checks for STRIDE: is Elevation of Privilege possible on this endpoint?
Classifies the finding as P0 if authorization is missing at any critical layer
